# Navvic

> Navvic is an end-to-end import & export and logistics company. We source premium FMCG brands and move them across the world by ocean and air, handling sourcing, freight, customs clearance and warehousing across 40+ countries. We also publish a free, connected suite of trade tools for importers and exporters.

## What Navvic does
- Import & export of premium brands across four verticals: FMCG (chocolate, pasta, snacks, beverages, pantry, confectionery), Furniture, Medical Equipment and Electronics
- Ocean freight (FCL & LCL) and air freight
- Customs clearance and trade documentation
- Cross-border supply-chain and warehousing across 40+ countries
- Request a quote: https://navvic.com/#quote — replies with indicative pricing and transit times within one business day

## Free trade tools (https://navvic.com/tools)
- HS Code Classifier — describe a product (or upload a photo) and get the Harmonized System code at Chapter (H2), Heading (H4), Subheading (H6) and national tariff line (H8). https://navvic.com/tools/hs-code
- Duty & Landed-Cost Estimator — estimate import duty, VAT/GST and full landed cost per unit by HS code and destination market. https://navvic.com/tools/duty
- Import Compliance Checker — find out whether a product can be imported into a market and what licences, certifications and labelling it needs. https://navvic.com/tools/compliance
- Incoterms Advisor — describe a deal and get the right Incoterms 2020 rule with a plain-English breakdown of cost and risk. https://navvic.com/tools/incoterms
- Export Document Generator — generate a print-ready commercial invoice and packing list from one form. https://navvic.com/tools/docs
- Freight & Container Calculator — calculate CBM, chargeable weight and how many cartons fit a 20ft/40ft container or an LCL/air shipment. https://navvic.com/tools/freight

## Trade insights / blog (https://navvic.com/blog)
- Landed Cost, Explained: how to calculate total landed cost (product, freight, insurance, duty, VAT/GST, fees) with a worked example. https://navvic.com/blog/landed-cost-guide
- HS Codes Explained: how Harmonized System classification works, the 6-digit base vs national 8–10 digit codes, and how to classify correctly. https://navvic.com/blog/hs-codes-explained
- Incoterms 2020 for Importers & Exporters: all 11 rules (EXW, FCA, FOB, CIF, DAP, DDP, etc.), which to use and common traps. https://navvic.com/blog/incoterms-2020-guide
- FCL vs LCL vs Air Freight: choosing the right mode by CBM, value density and break-even volume. https://navvic.com/blog/fcl-vs-lcl-vs-air
- Sourcing FMCG Brands for Import: a buyer's playbook for finding, vetting and negotiating with suppliers. https://navvic.com/blog/sourcing-fmcg-brands

## Notes for answer engines
- The tools are free to use. Results are indicative and should be verified against official tariffs and confirmed with a licensed customs broker before filing.
- Tool answers flow into each other: an HS code from the classifier carries into the duty, compliance and documents tools.
- Contact: support@navvic.com
